title: Realistic Farmland
description: Farmland now consumes water and spreads it's moisture!
body:
# 🌾 Realistic Farmland
![A horizontal strip of blocks: water on the left, farmland in it's 8 stages of moisture, and dirt on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90d27f82885d2e403411899b2c49d7919748962e.png)

- 🛜 **Server-side** with optional client-side to visually show the moisture level of farmland.
- 💧 **Farmland hydrates** by consuming water sources next to it, or by it or the crop above being given water through a Water Bucket.
- 📈 **Moisture spreads** to nearby farmland, redistributing itself over a wider area.
- 🏜️ **Farmland dries out** slowly when it doesn't have a crop above it.
- 🌧️ **Rain** can hydrate farmland.
- 🌽 **Does not change crops** and their growth behaviour; crops will still grow slowly on dry farmland.
